faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have completed Diploma in Engineering /B.Sc from recognised University.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must be a graduate from a recognised college /university.
UG Diploma Candidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.
After 10th Diploma Candidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Located in Hyderabad, Telangana, Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy was established in 2008. Founded as a private institute, Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy has received approvals and recognitions from nationally-renowned institution such as AICTE. The Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy provides UG, PG and After 10th in Full Time mode. Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy has 16 courses available for students including specialisations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Civil Engineering.

As per the official website of Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy, it offers B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, After 10th Diploma and as courses. These programmes are available across various streams such as . The Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy course fee ranges from to. The total annual seat intake is .

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy offers B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma programmes at the UG level in Full Time mode. At the PG level, Avanthi's Scientific Technological and Research Academy offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM programmes. These courses are offered across various streams, namely, Engineering and Business and Management Studies among others with a fee structure ranging from INR 44,700 to 2,40,000 for a course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college for success and education.

content.Placements: Our batch is still studying, so placements have not started yet. From what I have heard from seniors, not many get placed, around 30 to 40 percent, maybe. The highest salary I have heard is about Rs 25,000 to 30,000 per month, while the average is around Rs 15,000 per month. Some students do not get any offers at all.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a great infrastructure. The building is beautiful and well-maintained. Library is spacious and all books are available. The Wi-Fi is not for students, but for the staff. Labs are neat and have all the necessary equipment for our BPT course. The food in the canteen is okay, not that great but you can manage. There is a small hospital on campus for first aid and medical help as well. There is a sports ground also. Students play volleyball, cricket, and other games sometimes. The facilities are good enough for study.

individual_reviews.title: This college is good but there are some things which should be much better.

The training and placement cell is present for placements. However, there are very few placement and internship opportunities. Companies like Mecloids and Maclen have visited for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not good, and water coolers are not functioning properly. There is no Wi-Fi available. The library is good for peaceful studying, and many books are available. Labs are decent but lack chemicals. Hostel food is not very good on a regular basis. An ambulance is available on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Career Point University Kota Admission 2025: Admission Process, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Career Point University admissionis open for all courses. The university offers various programmes at UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma levels.Career Point Universityoffers courses atUG, PG diploma, and doctoral levelsin multiple streams such asCommerce, Management, Engineering, and others.The university offersadmission based on merit or an entrance examto all the courses. Interested candidates can applyonline and offlineon the official website of the university. To know more aboutCareer Point University admission 2025along with course eligibility and selection criteria, go through the following section:

Career Point University eligibilityvaries from course to course. However, a minimum ofClass 12is required to apply forUG courses.Graduationis required to apply for any of thePG courses. Below mentioned are popularCareer Point University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Career Point University admission processbegins with registration followed by selection rounds. Currently, the Career Point University admission is open for all courses. Candidates are required to follow the below steps of theCareer Point University Admission Process 2025:
STEP 1: Career Point University Application Process 2025
Candidates can apply online or buy the application form from the campus or city admission office. Candidates must pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

Career Point University selects candidates based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for all the courses. Candidates need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria i.e., passed Class 12 for admission to UG courses and have a graduation degree for admission to PG courses. The university also accepts CUET-UG scores for a few UG programmes. CPU also considers JEE Main or CPU-EST scores for BTech course.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are shortlisted, they are called for document verification and reporting. Aspirants are required to pay theCPU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

reviews_list.review_title: NMDC has good infrastructure, but faculty and placements are average. Needs improvement in academics

review_content.Placements: At natwarlal maniklal dalal (NMD) college, approximately 50% of students in the MBA programme secure placements. The salary packages range from ?3 to ?7.5 Lacs per annum, with an average of ?5 Lacs The placement is average but the facilities are supercool and serious about studies thega also provide study material in a very good time of practical .
review_content.Infrastructure: NMD College offers well-equipped labs, modern classrooms, and a library. A canteen provides meals, but no hostel or mess is available. Sports facilities exist, but Wi-Fi and medical aid are lacking. Basic infrastructure supports academics, but amenities need improvement.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: If you have a limited budget you can surely go for this college.

review_content.Placements: Out of 50 students around 25-30 students secured placement. The highest salary package is around 18 LPA and the lowest salary package is around 6 LPA. Around 60% of students secured internships. Top recruiting company is TCS and top roles offered are sales manager and finance analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is not available and infrastructure is okay. Medical facilities are not available and there is no mess. Canteen and sports activities are also limited. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Department is good and staff behavior is also good, but a bit rude at the admission counter.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college make it easier for students to study.

review_content.Placements: 30 percent of students were placed in my college. 4 to 8 lacs per annum is the range of the packages offered here. About 40 percent of students got internships from our course. The roles offered also include the leading entrepreneurship roles as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is great with fresh air, a good environment and surrounded by lots of trees. Classrooms are maintained clean. There are many useful things and machines in our college lab. The canteen is also good where delicious food is provided. Medical facilities are available for free which is really helpful for students.

individual_reviews.title: College is still not on top. They have to work on many things like infrastructure and events.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 75,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 12,000 per month and the average salary offered was Rs. 40,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Banks, Amazon, Google, etc., visited the campus. Roles offered are financial manager, investment banker, investment fund manager, etc. The highest salary offered in our course was 1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month and the average salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month. Almost 75% of students got an internship in banks or the IT department.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The finest faculty at NMD Gondia and manageable infrastructure

content.Placements: The placements were quite at low levels during my session. Only two or three companies came for placements which are Star Union, Daichi Insurance, Airtel and one local company. Actually, for placements, our college refers us to go to Nagpur for open placements. For our senior batch, it was the same as with us. It will be very unfair if I say the placed students percentage is hardly 3%, Actually, the people are not very much aware of the placements and they even do not sit in the placement, so a very low strength of people are participating. Now coming on the package, it is average at 1.20 lakhs to 2.5 lakhs and no internships are provided directly by the college. But, they suggest and recommend some students to some companies, but the companies they recommend for the internship offer no stipend, just an experience which is priceless. Some students, including me, find companies on ourselves for the internship. Finally, coming to the roles offered to the students, the students are very less participative and they hesitate in taking roles and responsibilities which is like a school, where the students absent themselves from the class if they have not done their homework. This example is perfect for making you understand about the condition.

content.Placements: At natwarlal maniklal dalal (NMD) college, approximately 50% of students in the MBA programme secure placements. content.Infrastructure: NMD College offers well-equipped labs, modern classrooms, and a library. A canteen provides meals, but no hostel or mess is available. Sports facilities exist, but Wi-Fi and medical aid are lacking. Basic infrastructure supports academics, but amenities need improvement.

individual_reviews.title: If you have a limited budget you can surely go for this college.

content.Placements: Out of 50 students around 25-30 students secured placement. The highest salary package is around 18 LPA and the lowest salary package is around 6 LPA. Around 60% of students secured internships. Top recruiting company is TCS and top roles offered are sales manager and finance analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is not available and infrastructure is okay. Medical facilities are not available and there is no mess. Canteen and sports activities are also limited. Wi-Fi is not available for students. Department is good and staff behavior is also good, but a bit rude at the admission counter.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college make it easier for students to study.

content.Placements: 30 percent of students were placed in my college. 4 to 8 lacs per annum is the range of the packages offered here. About 40 percent of students got internships from our course. The roles offered also include the leading entrepreneurship roles as well.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is great with fresh air, a good environment and surrounded by lots of trees. Classrooms are maintained clean. Medical facilities are available for free which is really helpful for students.

review_summary.college_name: Aryabhatta College of Engineering and Research Center Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aryabhatta College - ACERC.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide internships. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. They organise job fairs every year. Many students were placed through a mega job fair.
content.Infrastructure: There are blocks. The boys' hostel is available. A library, classrooms, and LAN facilities are available. The infrastructure is not bad. There are clean floors.
content.Faculty: All teachers in our college are good. They are well-educated. Some teachers are Ph.D. holders. Semester exams are not that difficult. If students can try their best, they can easily pass.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, but dissatisfied because of the pandemic.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is approximately 10%. The highest package offered is 5.2 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.2 LPA. There is no chance for an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are quite good. Labs, classrooms and the library are good. The food quality is average. Sports and games facilities are nice. I don't know about medical facilities. Connectivity is average, but sometimes, it works quite well, and all the classrooms have smart facilities.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful, and their teaching quality is average. This course curriculum doesn't make the students industry-ready. Semester exams are quite difficult, but you will enjoy them. The pass percentage depends on hard work, but the pass percentage is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: All students with great skills get placements. Companies like TSN, Cyntexa, and small-scale companies come to the college. An engineer's role is offered mostly. Every student tries to get placements. At least 90% of the dedicated students get placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has great facilities. Everything in our college is great, including the infrastructure. The labs are fantastic, the classrooms are digital and friendly, and they have a huge library that has all types of books on all subjects. The mess has really good and hygienic food. Hostels are clean and ragging-free.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the worst college, and I suggest you never take admission here.

content.Placements: Placements are not offered by our college nor companies visit here for placements. Only local and small scale companies from near that city only visit here for placements, and they are not useful. From this college, we did not get selected for internships in any company because its reputation is poor. Our college claimed that companies like Maruti, Tata, Toshniwal Limited and many other companies visit here for internships, but they didn't. Even our college didn't help us for internships, and it just used to earn money by us.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi facility only for faculty members. Labs are not useful and available only for namesake. There is a lab for a particular stream, but practicals are not held in it. However, classrooms are good. The library is also provided for namesake, and we get only a few particular books there. The canteen is mostly closed, and it is available only for namesake. I don't know about the medical facility as I never used it. Sports are conducted once in a year just for namesake.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: An average college to study.

content.Placements: You can expect a good placement from this college. Job placements are good and the salary they get is also good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The classrooms are quite good, clean and the garden is good. They have a basketball court and an indoor court. The labs, library and seminar halls are good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good and environment of the college is good. The teachers are experienced and their study pattern is quite good. The environment is like that of a school. The only drawback is that you cannot leave the classes in between.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Bon Maharaj Engineering College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bon Maharaj Engineering College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Bon Maharaj Engineering College programmes is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Bon Maharaj Engineering College provides programmes including UG Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM, After 10th Diploma in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Sales & Marketing, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: Bon Maharaj: come and shape yourself.

review_content.Placements: There are no proper placements in the college. A very less percentage of the people get placed here and a few companies like the Amazon, a company from Uttarakhand and such visit the campus. The package provided was for around Rs. 1.9 lakhs per annum. The job offer was in a franchise company for achieving the target given.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a great infrastructure consisting of the library, greenery, and buildings which were properly maintained. Laboratory was good for all classes with fully equipped and with new technologies. The canteen was also on the campus with good and affordable food. My recommendation would be the chilly potato.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty and facilities are average. The placements are not good.

review_content.Placements: This college does not provide placements to the students. In my secession 2014-17, only one company visited in our college, Amazon.in., and company selected 15 students from BBA and MBA. But no one joined the company because the company offered the salary of 12-18 thousand per month and it was far from the city. The role was to promote the company to the retailers so that they can include these retailers with the company to get the orders and so easily the company can complete their order with the help of these retailers and wholesalers. The internship is also not provided by the college if any student is interested in internship then he/she can do it by themselves. The college is not going to help in the internship. So the students have to bear the cost of the internship by themselves.
